channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Exclusive first look at 2 giant pandas coming to US
item.description: Pandas Ping Ping and Fu Shuang are being loaned to Zoo Atlanta under a new International Cooperative Research Agreement between the zoo and the China ...

item.title: Ex-police officer arrested in mass shooting plot: Investigators
item.description: A former North Carolina police officer was arrested for allegedly plotting a mass shooting at a Louisiana festival.

item.title: US special forces soldier who won $409K on Maduro bet is arrested
item.description: The soldier allegedly bet on NicolÃ¡s Maduro's removal as president of Venezuela before news of the raid was reported, sources told CBS News.

item.title: Tornado barrels through Oklahoma, damaging 40 homes and shutting down roads
item.description: Officials say a powerful tornado that barreled through Oklahoma damaged about 40 homes in one county and sent emergency crews door-to-door in a hard h...

item.title: How much lower will the price of gold fall? Here's what some experts anticipate.
item.description: Gold's price could continue to dip, experts say, but it may not stay that way for long. Here's what to know.
